title: Diplodoc (toc.yaml)

title.description: Title of the documentation section. Shown in the browser tab and sidebar header.
title.markdownDescription: **`string`** Title of the documentation section. Shown in the browser tab and the navigation sidebar header.

href.description: Entry-point page for this TOC section (relative path to a .md or index.yaml file).
href.markdownDescription: **`string`** Entry-point page for this TOC section. Relative path to a `.md` file or nested `index.yaml`.

stage.description: Publication stage: new | preview | tech-preview | skip.
stage.markdownDescription: **`'new' | 'preview' | 'tech-preview' | 'skip'`** Publication stage controlling which builds include this entire section.
markdownEnumDescriptions: New section — visible only in **preview** builds. Excluded from production.
Preview — visible in preview and tech-preview builds.
Tech-preview — visible only in tech-preview builds.
Excluded from **all** builds. The section is completely skipped.

base.description: Base path prefix prepended to all relative hrefs in this TOC.
base.markdownDescription: **`string`** Base path prefix prepended to all relative `href` values in this TOC. Useful when the same TOC is included from multiple places.

singlePage.description: Generate a single-page HTML variant that combines all items into one page.
singlePage.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Generate a single-page HTML variant that concatenates all TOC items into one scrollable page.

label.description: Label badge(s) shown next to the TOC title in the sidebar.
label.markdownDescription:
**`TocLabel | TocLabel[]`** Badge label(s) shown next to the section title in the navigation sidebar.

```yaml
label:
  title: New
  theme: info
```

when.description: Condition expression for including this TOC. Liquid expression (string) or boolean.
when.markdownDescription:
**`string | boolean`** Condition for including this TOC in the build.

Use Liquid-style expressions with variables from `presets.yaml`:
```yaml
when: env == 'production'
when: feature_flag
when: false  # always hidden
```

navigation.description: Top navigation bar configuration (logo + header items).
navigation.markdownDescription:
**`boolean | string | Navigation`** Top navigation bar configuration.

- `false` — disable the nav bar
- `'...'` — path to a shared navigation YAML file
- Object — inline navigation with `logo` and `header` fields

startPages.description: Pages prepended at the start of the PDF.
startPages.markdownDescription: **`string[]`** Paths to `.md` pages prepended at the beginning of the PDF output.

endPages.description: Pages appended at the end of the PDF.
endPages.markdownDescription: **`string[]`** Paths to `.md` pages appended at the end of the PDF output.

pdf.description: PDF generation config. Fields: startPages (string[]), endPages (string[]).
pdf.markdownDescription:
**`object`** PDF generation settings for this section.

- `startPages` **`string[]`** — `.md` pages prepended at the beginning of the PDF
- `endPages` **`string[]`** — `.md` pages appended at the end of the PDF

items.description: List of TOC items (pages, sections, or includes).
items.markdownDescription:
**`TocItem[]`** The navigation tree. Each item can be:
- A **page** (has `href`)
- A **section** (has `name` + nested `items`)
- An **include** (has `include` with a `path`)

title.description: Label text displayed in the badge.

description.description: Tooltip text shown on hover over the badge.
description.markdownDescription: **`string`** Tooltip text shown when hovering over the badge.

theme.description: Visual theme of the badge: normal | info | danger | warning | success | utility | unknown | clear.
theme.markdownDescription: **`string`** Visual color theme of the badge.

when.description: Liquid condition expression. Badge is hidden when false.
when.markdownDescription: **`string | boolean`** Liquid condition — badge is hidden when the expression is falsy.

TocLabel.description: Badge label shown next to a TOC entry in the sidebar.
TocLabel.markdownDescription: **`TocLabel`** Badge label shown next to a TOC title in the navigation sidebar.

name.description: Display name of the item in the navigation sidebar.
name.markdownDescription: **`string`** Display name in the navigation sidebar.

expanded.description: Whether this section starts expanded in the sidebar.
expanded.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Start this section expanded in the sidebar (`true`) or collapsed (`false`).

labeled.description: Show the label badge next to this item's children.
labeled.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Propagate the label badge to all children of this section.

hidden.description: Exclude this item from the sidebar (but the page is still built).
hidden.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Hide this item in the sidebar. The page is still built and accessible by direct URL.

restricted-access.description: Access restriction rules. String or array of role/group conditions.
restricted-access.markdownDescription: **`string | string[]`** Access restriction conditions. The user must satisfy at least one condition to see this item.

when.description: Liquid condition. Item is excluded when false.
when.markdownDescription:
**`string | boolean`** Liquid condition — item is excluded from the build when the expression is falsy.

```yaml
when: env == 'internal'
```

TocItem.description: A single navigation item — either a page link, a section, or a TOC include.
TocItem.markdownDescription:
**`TocItem`** Navigation entry. Must be one of:
- **Page** — has `href`
- **Section** — has `items` (and optionally `name`)
- **Include** — has `include`

href.description: Relative path to the target .md file or URL.
href.markdownDescription: **`string`** Relative path to the `.md` page (e.g. `guide/intro.md`) or an external URL.

mode.markdownDescription: **`'link' | 'merge' | 'root_merge'`** How the included TOC is grafted into the current tree.
markdownEnumDescriptions: **link** — include as a subsection with its own root. The included TOC keeps its own `base` path.
**merge** — merge items directly into the current level. Items inherit the current `base`.
**root_merge** — merge items at the root of the TOC. Ignores nesting level.

path.description: Relative path to the toc.yaml to include.
path.markdownDescription: **`string`** Relative path to the `toc.yaml` file to include (e.g. `../shared/toc.yaml`).

includers.description: List of includer plugins that transform the included content.
includers.markdownDescription:
**`Includer[]`** Plugins that process the included content before merging.

Common includers: `openapi`, `unarchive`.

Include.description: Directive to include another toc.yaml file into this navigation tree.
Include.markdownDescription: **`Include`** Directive to include another `toc.yaml` into this navigation tree.

logo.description: Logo shown in the top-left of the navigation bar.
logo.markdownDescription:
**`NavigationLogo`** Logo shown in the top-left corner of the navigation bar.

- `text` — text label
- `url` — click destination URL
- `icon` — image URL
- `dark` / `light` — theme-specific variants

header.description: Header navigation items. Fields: leftItems (NavigationItem[]), rightItems (NavigationItem[]), iconSize (number).
header.markdownDescription:
**`NavigationHeader`** Header navigation items.

- `leftItems` **`NavigationItem[]`** — items shown on the left
- `rightItems` **`NavigationItem[]`** — items shown on the right
- `iconSize` **`number`** — default icon size in pixels

Navigation.description: Top nav bar config. Fields: logo (NavigationLogo), header (NavigationHeader).
Navigation.markdownDescription:
**`Navigation`** Top navigation bar layout.

- `logo` **`NavigationLogo`** — logo in the top-left corner
- `header` **`NavigationHeader`** — left/right header link groups

text.markdownDescription: **`string`** Text label shown next to (or instead of) the logo image.

url.markdownDescription: **`string`** URL the logo links to when clicked.

urlTitle.markdownDescription: **`string`** Accessible title for the logo link (tooltip / screen-reader text).

dark.markdownDescription: **`NavigationLogo`** Logo variant for dark theme — overrides the root logo fields.

light.markdownDescription: **`NavigationLogo`** Logo variant for light theme — overrides the root logo fields.

NavigationLogo.description: Navigation bar logo. Fields: text, url, urlTitle, icon, dark (NavigationLogo), light (NavigationLogo).
NavigationLogo.markdownDescription:
**`NavigationLogo`** Navigation bar logo configuration.

- `text` **`string`** — text label (shown when no image)
- `url` **`string`** — click destination URL
- `urlTitle` **`string`** — accessible title / tooltip
- `icon` **`string`** — image URL
- `dark` **`NavigationLogo`** — dark-theme variant
- `light` **`NavigationLogo`** — light-theme variant

leftItems.description: Navigation items shown on the left side of the header.
leftItems.markdownDescription: **`NavigationItem[]`** Navigation items shown on the **left** side of the header bar.

rightItems.description: Navigation items shown on the right side of the header.
rightItems.markdownDescription: **`NavigationItem[]`** Navigation items shown on the **right** side of the header bar.

iconSize.description: Default icon size in pixels for all header items.
iconSize.markdownDescription: **`number`** Default icon size in pixels for header item icons.

NavigationHeader.description: Navigation header. Fields: leftItems (NavigationItem[]), rightItems (NavigationItem[]), iconSize (number).
NavigationHeader.markdownDescription:
**`NavigationHeader`** Navigation header item groups.

- `leftItems` **`NavigationItem[]`** — items shown on the left side
- `rightItems` **`NavigationItem[]`** — items shown on the right side
- `iconSize` **`number`** — default icon size in pixels

type.description: Item type: link | button | dropdown | controls.

NavigationItem.description: Navigation header item. type field determines variant: link | button | dropdown | controls.
NavigationItem.markdownDescription:
**`NavigationItem`** A navigation header item. The `type` field determines the variant:
- `link` — text link (requires `text`, `url`)
- `button` — CTA button (requires `text`, `url`)
- `dropdown` — dropdown menu (requires `items`)
- `controls` — theme/language switcher

text.markdownDescription: **`string`** Label text displayed for this navigation item.

icon.markdownDescription: **`string`** Icon image URL displayed next to the text.

iconSize.markdownDescription: **`number`** Icon size in pixels (overrides the header-level `iconSize`).

when.markdownDescription: **`string | boolean`** Liquid visibility condition — item is hidden when falsy.

NavigationBaseItem.description: Base navigation item fields: text, url, icon, iconSize, when.
NavigationBaseItem.markdownDescription:
**`NavigationBaseItem`** Shared fields for all navigation item types.

- `text` **`string`** — label text
- `url` **`string`** — link URL
- `icon` **`string`** — icon image URL
- `iconSize` **`number`** — icon size in pixels
- `when` **`string | boolean`** — visibility condition

counters.markdownDescription:
**`object`** Counter filter for this event.

- `include` **`string[]`** — counter IDs to include
- `exclude` **`string[]`** — counter IDs to exclude

context.markdownDescription: **`string`** Event context string passed with the analytics event.

NavigationAnalyticsEvent.description: Analytics event. Fields: name (string, required), type (string), counters (object), context (string).
NavigationAnalyticsEvent.markdownDescription:
**`NavigationAnalyticsEvent`** Analytics event attached to a navigation item click.

- `name` **`string`** — event name (**required**)
- `type` **`string`** — event type
- `counters` **`object`** — counter filter (`include: string[]`, `exclude: string[]`)
- `context` **`string`** — event context string

markdownDescription:
Diplodoc table-of-contents file (`toc.yaml`).
Defines the structure, navigation hierarchy, and metadata of a documentation section.
```yaml title: My Docs href: index.yaml items:
  - name: Getting started
    href: quickstart.md
  - name: Reference
    items:
      - name: API
        href: api.md
```
